expectations.text: The output does not recommend Linux while Registry and System.Web blockers remain.
expectations.evidence: The recommendation is WINDOWS INCREMENTAL_SIDE_BY_SIDE; MODERN_CROSS_PLATFORM and linuxPromotion are BLOCKED with Registry/System.Web blockers.

expectations.text: The output marks Web Forms UI as rewrite-required and uses incremental YARP/System.Web adapter steps with an exit decision.
expectations.evidence: aspnet-side-by-side uses YARP_AND_SYSTEM_WEB_ADAPTER, sets ui REWRITE_REQUIRED, and records an adapter removal/ownership decision.

expectations.text: The output treats custom WCF binding as partial/redesign with architecture approval and stages EF6 before per-context EF Core/EDMX regeneration.
expectations.evidence: wcf-decision is PARTIAL_REQUIRES_REDESIGN with architectureApproval; ef-transition keeps EF6 first, migrates per context, regenerates EDMX, and establishes a new history baseline.

claims.claim: The plan is not execution evidence
claims.evidence: Transcript and user notes explicitly say no build/runtime validation was claimed.

needs_review: Architecture approval for custom WCF binding
Web Forms rewrite and System.Web adapter ownership
EDMX regeneration against approved test database

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions discriminate unsafe cross-platform, UI, service and data shortcuts.
